steps.action: Launch isolated tmux session on utv_ws_tui_cross

steps.expected: Launcher surface lists create/switch/rename/kill and exit
steps.observed: Launcher displayed create, switch, rename, kill, exit

assertions.title: Kill action requires confirmation and keeps client in valid context

steps.action: Create ws_kill_target via Prefix+g -> a -> c
Switch to ws_kill_target via Prefix+g -> a -> s
steps.expected: Client context moves to target workspace

steps.action: Run kill flow and enter NO at YES prompt
steps.observed: Kill canceled message emitted; ws_kill_target still attached

steps.action: Run kill flow and enter YES
steps.expected: Target workspace killed and client moved to deterministic fallback
steps.observed: ws_kill_target removed; context moved to ws006_main:1.0

steps.action: Attempt kill when only one workspace remains
steps.expected: Safe rejection without orphaning client context
steps.observed: Kill rejected with 'cannot kill the last remaining workspace'; ws006_main preserved

steps.action: Start fresh isolated socket with no prior @workspace_agent_last_agent
steps.observed: Prefix table maps g to workspace_agent and workspace_agent table includes a/A

steps.action: Press Prefix+g then ? and Prefix+g then a
steps.expected: Help and launcher expose a/A and workspace routes
steps.observed: Help message shows a/A affordances; launcher opens with workspace actions

assertions.title: No dead-end navigation across launcher routes

steps.expected: Launcher can be exited without breaking client context
steps.observed: Returned to prompt in same session context

steps.action: Run Prefix+g -> A immediately after cancel
steps.expected: Quick relaunch route reachable and non-destructive
steps.observed: No-history message shown; flow stayed interactive

steps.expected: Client remains usable after route sequence

frictions.description: Popup/fzf launcher mode made prompt/result capture less deterministic for proof artifacts.
frictions.resolution: For VAL-WS-006 validation socket only, set @workspace_agent_popup_mode=0 and validated through menu-key routes (c/s/x).

frictions.description: tmux status plugin logs frequent tokyo-night invalid-option messages that add noise to message logs.
frictions.resolution: Filtered validation evidence to explicit workspace-agent command/message lines and session/context snapshots.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Interactive flows verified on isolated tmux sockets with tuistory artifacts and message/session/context evidence.
